---
title: "Hobby"
format: html

---


## Gaming

Whenever I am free, I would like to play first-person shooter (FPS) games. Like Counter Strike 2 and Valorant.

# Valorant
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/EiVF6QsAijo?si=UaICsmqGY3Osw9Lc >}}

# Counter Strike 2
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/embed/c80dVYcL69E?si=6jnDFoAYguREMKbh >}}
